note: Seed 3-level disease hierarchy. Level 0=family (organ/syndrome class), 1=genus (specific disease group), 2=species (leaf dx). This is a starter set; extend via LLM-clustering script over the active registry. Species assignments may reference any genus or family id; unknown parents degrade to flat behavior.

families.label: Cardiovascular syndrome
families.summary: Heart and great-vessel pathology: ACS, heart failure, arrhythmia, aortic, pericardial.

families.label: Pulmonary syndrome
families.summary: Lung + airway pathology: pneumonia, PE, asthma, COPD, pneumothorax, ARDS.

families.label: Neurologic syndrome
families.summary: CNS/PNS pathology: stroke, seizure, meningitis, demyelination, peripheral neuropathy.

families.label: Infectious syndrome
families.summary: Bacterial, viral, fungal, parasitic infections; sepsis spectrum.

families.label: Gastrointestinal syndrome
families.summary: Luminal GI, hepatobiliary, pancreatic, peritoneal disease.

families.label: Renal / GU syndrome
families.summary: Kidney, ureter, bladder, prostate, gynecologic; AKI/CKD.

families.label: Metabolic / endocrine decompensation
families.summary: DKA, HHS, thyroid storm, adrenal crisis, electrolyte emergencies.

families.label: Hematologic syndrome
families.summary: Anemia, coagulopathy, TMA, hemolysis, bone-marrow failure.

families.label: Oncologic syndrome
families.summary: Solid tumors, hematologic malignancy, paraneoplastic; tumor emergencies.

families.label: Rheumatologic / autoimmune syndrome
families.summary: SLE, RA, vasculitis, spondyloarthritis, autoimmune crises.

families.label: Dermatologic syndrome
families.summary: Rash, drug eruption, cellulitis, severe cutaneous reactions (SJS/TEN).

families.label: Musculoskeletal syndrome
families.summary: Fracture, soft-tissue injury, arthritis, tendon/ligament, compartment.

families.label: Psychiatric syndrome
families.summary: Mood, psychosis, substance, anxiety disorders; delirium overlap.

families.label: Toxicologic syndrome
families.summary: Intoxication, overdose, withdrawal, envenomation, drug reactions.

families.label: Trauma syndrome
families.summary: Blunt/penetrating injury: head, chest, abdomen, orthopedic, polytrauma.

families.label: Obstetric / gynecologic syndrome
families.summary: Pregnancy-related (eclampsia, ectopic), gynecologic emergencies.

families.label: Ophthalmologic syndrome
families.summary: Vision-threatening eye disease; red eye, acute vision loss.

families.label: ENT syndrome
families.summary: Upper airway, ear, nose, throat pathology; peritonsillar/retropharyngeal.

families.label: Allergic / immunologic syndrome
families.summary: Anaphylaxis, angioedema, immunodeficiency, hypersensitivity.

families.label: Pediatric-specific syndrome
families.summary: Age-specific pediatric emergencies (bronchiolitis, intussusception, Kawasaki).

families.label: Geriatric syndrome
families.summary: Frailty, falls, delirium, polypharmacy-related decompensation.

families.label: Nutritional / vitamin deficiency syndrome
families.summary: Refeeding, Wernicke, pellagra, scurvy; malnutrition states.

families.label: Environmental exposure syndrome
families.summary: Heat stroke, hypothermia, drowning, altitude, radiation.

families.label: Genetic / inherited syndrome
families.summary: Mendelian disorders, inborn errors of metabolism, channelopathies.

families.label: Iatrogenic syndrome
families.summary: Device, procedure, drug-induced pathology not otherwise classified.
